title: 20 Screening in Montreal
wikitext:
[]: 2.0 Screening in Montreal.             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 30, 2010 6:21 pm Whoo~

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Wed Jun 30, 2010 6:25 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jun 30, 2010 6:44 pm There were already official English subtitles from the Russian screening.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Wed Jun 30, 2010 6:46 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 30, 2010 7:38 pm The official subs (for 2.0, not 2.22) are in this post, no idea if the links still work or not: EdZ wrote: If it's any help, I've re-uploaded the official subs: [url]http://rapidshare.com/files/391836607/roe2.0_en.rar.html[/url] [url]http://www.megaupload.com/?d=DMS6KK9V[/url] [url]http://www.mediafire.com/?z2jmyq2zmvk[/url] [url]http://www.zshare.net/download/76546787de38aefe/[/url] [url]http://www.sendspace.com/file/jk70x9[/url] The script is untimed, and does not include the new scenes or Kaiji's english dialogue. Might help for TL checking though.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Wed Jun 30, 2010 7:47 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Wed Jun 30, 2010 7:53 pm This is my neighbourhood! Sort of... But amusingly enough, my Hong Kong blu-ray just arrived, with subtitles, and I have friends with "home theatres" (and presumably money trees in their backyards). When I saw 1.0 in the theatres I nearly had a heart attack. It was like the animation was too much intensity. I wish there had been more screenings like this... ages and ages ago. It is almost like the part where Leonardo diCaprio is all dying and Claire Danes is like shit we didn't already take the poison did we? I'm not sure if that makes sense, but I'm running with it.
